---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea
labels: enhancement
---

## What are you trying to do?

Describe the goal in one or two sentences. "I want to [X] so I can [Y]."

## Proposed solution

What you have in mind. A rough sketch is fine — we don't need a full
spec.

## Alternatives

Other approaches you considered, and why you landed where you did.

## Context

Anything else that helps: related features, links, screenshots.
